chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. 1st Appeal No.04 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of C.M.A. No.410/2024 (stay application). 2. For hearing of main case. 30.01.2025 Mr. Mola Bux Ayoub Laghari, Advocate for appellant. == Learned counsel for the appellant has produced certified true copies of statement dated 3rd October 2024 filed by the decree holder Farzan Ali son of Muneer Ahmed Malik in Execution Application No.04 of 2024 arising out of Summary Suit No.14 of 2023. He has also filed certified true copy of order dated 3rd October 2024 passed by learned Additional District Judge, Hala and states that issue which was subject matter of the decree impugned herein and in the Execution Application as well, has been resolved between the parties, based whereon the decree holder filed a statement before the learned Additional District Judge Hala for withdrawal of the Execution Application, upon satisfaction of the decree holder. He requests for withdrawal of the appeal as having become infructuous. Upon perusal of the record in the instant appeal it appears that Judgment dated 12th December 2023 which was passed in Summary Suit No.14 of 2023 is the subject matter of the present appeal and the certified copies as produced by the learned counsel also disclose that the same pertains to the Execution Application No.04 of 2024 arising out of the same Summary Suit 14 of 2023 which is subject matter of instant appeal. The request for withdrawal is allowed accordingly. Appeal stands dismissed as withdrawn. J U D G E
